name: Official Democratic Record
subject: It's not too late to make a difference this year:
body:
Your supporter record ** OFFICIAL 2016 SUPPORTER RECORD
NAME: On file
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2f4/4067b0a/22a6eec2f/7e797c05/2869350433/VEsEBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=22+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc_nd&source=em_20161229_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Just 29 from Silver Spring before 2017
body:
Our last deadline of 2016
---
** OFFICIAL 2016 SUPPORTER RECORD
NAME: On file
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
2016 DONOR: Not yet

**This year is coming to an end, and we need to know you're committed to fighting back against the GOP and the Trump administration. Will you become a 2016 donor?

** **[CHIP IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a6e/4247330690/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+CHIP+IN&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd")****
Friend --

In a few days, I'm closing the books on 2016. But before I do, I want to make sure you have a chance to update your supporter record.

Here's what we have on file for dpwillis67@gmail.com:

**OFFICIAL 2016 SUPPORTER RECORD
NAME: On file
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
2016 DONOR: Not yet
**
I know you're someone who cares about the future of our party and our country. It's so incredibly important for Democrats to go into 2017 at full strength, with our best foot forward.

We're looking for 29 more folks like you in Silver Spring to make their first donation before the end of 2016. If you're able to be one of them, I hope you'll pitch in $3 or more.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a6f/4247330690/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a6c/4247330690/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a6d/4247330690/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a6a/4247330690/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a6b/4247330690/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a68/4247330690/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpsmydemocratsorg2016Deadline&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd")****
Thank you so much. I know we can count on you.

Lindsey

Lindsey Reynolds
Chief Operating Officer
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a76/4247330690/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a77/4247330690/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c10a/4067b0a/2298042b2/7e796a74/4247330690/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161229_lr_nd&source=em_20161229_lr_nd"), or just reply to this email! name: Our Revolution
subject: Trump's ultra-wealthy cabinet picks
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
While Donald Trump is busy creating the wealthiest administration in our nation's history, we are fighting back by building a movement of people who are ready to demand our government work for the people, not a handful of wealthy campaign contributors.
We know Trump and his ultra-rich cabinet picks will do everything they can to work against the ideals of our nation and our political revolution.
**These are the very same wealthy elites who are used to buying candidates and elections in order to get what they want, except now they have been appointed to positions of power.**
[**Contribute $3 right now, before Saturday's end-of-year fundraising deadline, to say you are with us in the fight to tell the billionaire class that they can't have it all.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-billionaire-class?refcode=em161229-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-billionaire-class?refcode=em161229-full")
One of the goals of Bernie's presidential campaign was getting big money out of politics. Our Revolution is committed to continuing that work. Now that we are up against an incoming administration filled with some of the richest people in the country, our work is more important than ever.
Having a billionaire as our next president is bad enough, but soon we will have to deal with an entire cabinet of out-of-touch millionaires and billionaires who have been charged with heading the federal government.
**And in a few short weeks, they will get to work advancing policies that will benefit the rich at the expense of the middle class.**
If we are going to stand up to the billionaire class and continue transforming American politics to meet the needs of working families, we will need to stand together.
[**Contribute $3 right now, ahead of our end-of-year fundraising deadline, to say you are committed to creating a government that works for all of us, not just those at the top.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-billionaire-class?refcode=em161229-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-billionaire-class?refcode=em161229-full")
Let's show what is possible when we all come together to demand that our political and economic systems work for everyone.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-billionaire-class?refcode=em161229-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-billionaire-class?refcode=em161229-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
clean_body: Sisters and Brothers - While Donald Trump is busy creating the wealthiest administration in our nation's history, we are fighting back by building a movement of people who are ready to demand our government work for the people, not a handful of wealthy campaign contributors. We know Trump and his ultra-rich cabinet picks will do everything they can to work against the ideals of our nation and our political revolution. These are the very same wealthy elites who are used to buying candidates and elections in order to get what they want, except now they have been appointed to positions of power. "" One of the goals of Bernie's presidential campaign was getting big money out of politics. Our Revolution is committed to continuing that work. Now that we are up against an incoming administration filled with some of the richest people in the country, our work is more important than ever. Having a billionaire as our next president is bad enough, but soon we will have to deal with an entire cabinet of out-of-touch millionaires and billionaires who have been charged with heading the federal government. And in a few short weeks, they will get to work advancing policies that will benefit the rich at the expense of the middle class. If we are going to stand up to the billionaire class and continue transforming American politics to meet the needs of working families, we will need to stand together. "" Let's show what is possible when we all come together to demand that our political and economic systems work for everyone. In solidarity, Shannon Jackson Executive Director Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

name: Stop Trump in 2017
subject: before 2017:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
we can send one of two messages | Listen, this year's election was tough. We didn't see things go the way we wanted them to, but we can't let that stop us.

Midnight Saturday, Democrats are facing our FINAL Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of 2016. This is the first time we'll be reporting our fundraising numbers since the election. It is our chance to show that Democrats are ready to fight back against Trump from the moment he is sworn into office.

**Listen, we need to send a strong message by raising $25,000 before midnight Saturday. If we hit this goal, we 'll start 2017 in a strong place AND be prepared to fight back against Trump the minute he takes office.**

[**Chip in $3 now so we can FIGHT BACK in 2017 >>>**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-final-2016-fec?refcode=em122916&amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+ask+now+so+we+can+FIGHT+BACK+in+&utm_campaign=em122916&source=em122916")

_If you've saved your payment information in ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $10 immediately >>](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3c6/1a5213b3/75a6736b/718bc10d/934653884/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-final-2016-fec?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em122916&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Donate+ask+immediately+gtgt&utm_campaign=em122916&source=em122916")
---
[Donate $20 immediately >>](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3c6/1a5213b3/75a6736b/718bc10c/934653884/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-final-2016-fec?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em122916&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+immediately+gtgt&utm_campaign=em122916&source=em122916")
[ Donate $50 immediately >>](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3c6/1a5213b3/75a6736b/718bc10f/934653884/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-final-2016-fec?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em122916&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-++Donate+ask+immediately+gtgt&utm_campaign=em122916&source=em122916")
[ Donate $100 immediately >>](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3c6/1a5213b3/75a6736b/718bc10e/934653884/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-final-2016-fec?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em122916&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-++Donate+ask+immediately+gtgt&utm_campaign=em122916&source=em122916")
[ Or donate another amount](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-final-2016-fec?refcode=em122916&amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-++Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em122916&source=em122916")

** **

---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3c6/1a5213b3/75a6736b/718bc108/934653884/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI3NWE2NzM2YiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiM2M2In0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/75a6736b/77b4b3c6?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em122916&source=em122916") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

name: matt@dscc.org
subject: Friend, can I count you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
With so much at stake next year, we have to close out this month at full strength. But our latest report shows you haven't stepped up yet... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161229-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- I had to check in before our 2017 membership drive ends.

We've been reaching out to Democrats across America this week -- because with so much at stake next year, grassroots support could not be more vital. **And starting next year at less than 100% just isn 't an option.**

[**But our latest report shows you haven 't activated your membership yet, Friend. Will you pitch in before Saturday's end-of-year deadline?** ** We'll send a personalized member card if you do!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161229-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161229-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

There's a lot on our plate in 2017, from resisting Donald Trump's agenda to defending core values like the ones on these member cards. **But time's running out to rally the support we need to get the job done!**

[**So what do you say, Friend -- can I count you in? Then pitch in any amount to activate your 2017 membership and get your personalized card!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161229-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,
Matt Kehres
DSCC Digital Director

P.S. If you've renewed your membership over the last few days, your donation may still be processing. We're so grateful for your support!

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161229-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed6d/2b07114c/41b91e23/73682c02/3321535817/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed6d/2b07114c/41b91e23/73682c7d/3321535817/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed6d/2b07114c/41b91e23/73682c7c/3321535817/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name to say thanks to President Obama:
body:
Add your name to thank President Obama **We're so thankful for everything we've accomplished together -- and we wanted to give you the opportunity to say "thanks, Obama" yourself. Just add your note here, and we'll pass it along:

** **[THANKS, OBAMA](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+THANKS+OBAMA&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f")**
[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f")
**[http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+httpmydemocratsorgThankYouPresidentObama&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c108/4067b0a/2294c7c15/7e795571/507515195/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c108/4067b0a/2294c7c15/7e79557e/507515195/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c108/4067b0a/2294c7c15/7e79557f/507515195/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c108/4067b0a/2294c7c15/7e79557c/507515195/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161229_dnc2_f&source=em_20161229_dnc2_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Team Maggie
subject: Time to get back in the ring, team >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd20/2a380d31/144176a9/fec76d/3347217139/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd20/2a380d31/144176a9/fec76d/3347217139/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
It may seem early to get back in the ring, but Washington Republicans are going to do everything they can to grow their majority. If you believe that we ALL deserve a government that works to expand economic opportunity and inclusiveness, not one that just looks out for billionaires and corporate special interests, we need to get to work now -- before the end-of-year deadline.
**Senators Chris Murphy and Debbie Stabenow are sure to face tough reelections, so we're asking you directly:[Make a donation of $3 or more to Chris Murphy and Debbie Stabenow before Saturday's deadline so that together, we can hold the line in 2018.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd20/2a380d31/144176a9/fec76e/3347217139/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZGVjMjAxNl9taDRkc2NtIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNjEyMjlfbWg0ZHNjbTIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dec2016_mh4dscm?refcode=e20161229_mh4dscm2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Please, we're nowhere near our $15,000 goal and we need your help to get there:
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Chris Murphy, Debbie Stabenow, and Maggie Hassan:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd20/2a380d31/144176a9/fec76f/3347217139/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZGVjMjAxNl9taDRkc2NtIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNjEyMjlfbWg0ZHNjbTIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dec2016_mh4dscm?refcode=e20161229_mh4dscm2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**

In the Senate, both Chris and Debbie have shown what _true_ leadership looks like.
Earlier this year, when the Republican majority refused to allow any debate on gun safety, Chris Murphy stepped up and led a 15-hour filibuster to demand votes on critical gun safety measures.
Debbie Stabenow has always stood up for Main Street, not Wall Street, and she believes that a strong middle class is the key to job growth.
Washington Republicans are going to fight tooth and nail to win these seats and clear the way for their special interest agenda, so hitting our $15,000 goal before Saturday's deadline is critical. **Right now, we're falling short.**
[**Please, give $3 or more now to Debbie and Chris's campaigns so that we can show Washington Republicans that we're ready to fight.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd20/2a380d31/144176a9/fec76e/3347217139/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZGVjMjAxNl9taDRkc2NtIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNjEyMjlfbWg0ZHNjbTIiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dec2016_mh4dscm?refcode=e20161229_mh4dscm2&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thanks for stepping up before the deadline,
Team Maggie

clean_body: "" "" Team -- It may seem early to get back in the ring, but Washington Republicans are going to do everything they can to grow their majority. If you believe that we ALL deserve a government that works to expand economic opportunity and inclusiveness, not one that just looks out for billionaires and corporate special interests, we need to get to work now -- before the end-of-year deadline. Senators Chris Murphy and Debbie Stabenow are sure to face tough reelections, so we're asking you directly: "" Please, we're nowhere near our $15,000 goal and we need your help to get there: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Chris Murphy, Debbie Stabenow, and Maggie Hassan: "" "" "" "" In the Senate, both Chris and Debbie have shown what true leadership looks like. Earlier this year, when the Republican majority refused to allow any debate on gun safety, Chris Murphy stepped up and led a 15-hour filibuster to demand votes on critical gun safety measures. Debbie Stabenow has always stood up for Main Street, not Wall Street, and she believes that a strong middle class is the key to job growth. Washington Republicans are going to fight tooth and nail to win these seats and clear the way for their special interest agenda, so hitting our $15,000 goal before Saturday's deadline is critical. Right now, we're falling short. "" Thanks for stepping up before the deadline, Team Maggie ""
